question: What is the role of cAMP in GPCR signaling?
options: It is a second messenger activated by Gq proteins
It is a second messenger produced by adenylyl cyclase
It is a kinase that phosphorylates receptors
It is a G protein subunit
explanation: cAMP is produced by adenylyl cyclase when activated by Gs proteins. It activates protein kinase A (PKA) and serves as a key second messenger in many signaling pathways.
